title: Genie Agent (formerly Genie Space) enhancements
body:
* **Genie Chat prompt monitoring (Beta)**: Prompts and responses initiated by Genie Chat are now visible in Genie Agents (formerly Genie Spaces) monitoring when the sharing Beta is enabled. See [Test and monitor a Genie Agent](/aws/en/genie/monitor).
* **Knowledge store edit confirmation dialog**: A confirmation dialog now appears before an author removes a table that has knowledge store edits (for example, local table or column descriptions or hidden columns). See [Manage knowledge store metadata](/aws/en/genie/tune-quality#manage-knowledge-store-metadata).
* **Delete conversations**: Users with CAN MANAGE permission can now delete the conversations of other users from the UI, matching existing API capabilities. See [Delete a conversation](/aws/en/genie/monitor#delete-conversation).
* **Embed Genie Agent (formerly Genie Space) as an iframe (GA)**: Embedding a Genie Agent (formerly Genie Space) as an iframe is now generally available. See [Embed a Genie Agent in an external app](/aws/en/genie/embed).
